## Project Management Directives

*5 directives · auto-generated per push*

- Development decelerating (-46%) — operator may be blocked or shifting focus. Offer architecture-level suggestions, not just code.
- Intent bifurcation: `self_heal` dominant but `infrastructure` emerging — watch for context switches mid-session.
- `compression` declining — operator may have deprioritized this. Don't suggest work in this area unless explicitly asked.
- Unsaid themes detected: `acactututualal`, `e s`, `oooususushh` — these are words deleted from prompts. Operator is thinking about these but hasn't committed. Explore when relevant.
- Module focus cluster: `unsaid`, `file_heat_map`, `thought_completer` — pre-load context from these modules when operator starts typing.
